positive: A cyberpunk cityscape scene at night, viewed from a rainy rooftop. Neon signs advertise futuristic goods, glowing holographic advertisements float through the smog, and flying vehicles streak across the sky. Synthwave aesthetic, highly detailed, dramatic lighting, 8K digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, watercolor, soft edges, natural elements, muted colors
